_doc: Hand-authored, legally-sourced if/then rules merged ahead of derived rules by tools/derive_logic.py. Warnings-only. Not legal advice.

rules.message: File PA-005 (Protection Order Service Information) with the complaint so law enforcement can serve the defendant.
rules.authority: Maine Judicial Branch PFA filing requirements (PA-005)

rules.message: You asked to keep your address confidential — file PA-015 (Affidavit for Confidential Address) and omit your address from the public complaint.

then.suggest: Protection from Abuse requires a family/household member or dating relationship (19-A M.R.S. §4002). If no such relationship exists, the correct action is Protection from Harassment (PA-009) under 5 M.R.S. §3801.

rules.message: The described relationship may not qualify for Protection from Abuse (19-A M.R.S. §4002); if there is no family/household/dating relationship, consider Protection from Harassment (PA-009).
